hook: You're tired of pretending you're okay
slide2: Another day, another mask. Fake smiles, real exhaustion. The cup is empty but you’re still pouring.
slide3: You laugh at jokes that aren’t funny just to fit in. You nod when you don’t care. You move when you’re stuck.
slide4: The rain outside matches the noise in your head. Both sound louder when you're alone.
closer: When did you last tell someone how you really feel?
caption:
Some days are just about surviving the rain. You don’t have to be bright and shiny all the time.
What’s one thing you’re forcing yourself to fake today?
